title: gh#10: Refactor: Split media.service.ts god module
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/10.
Backlog section: Refactoring / type safety.

## Problem

media.service.ts bundles 7 functions across 4 concerns (upload processing, status queries, lifecycle management, retry logic) with 9 imports at 294 lines. SRP violation.

## Identified by

Code quality review Run 1 — architecture-reviewer (arch-002)

## Fix

Split into: media-upload.service.ts, media-query.service.ts, media-lifecycle.service.ts, media-retry.service.ts. Export from barrel.

## Files

- `packages/api/src/services/media.service.ts`
reproduction: media.service.ts bundles 7 functions across 4 concerns (upload processing, status queries, lifecycle management, retry logic) with 9 imports at 294 lines. SRP violation.
recommendation: Split into: media-upload.service.ts, media-query.service.ts, media-lifecycle.service.ts, media-retry.service.ts. Export from barrel.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: Imported from GitHub issue. Preserve or add focused regression coverage when the issue acceptance criteria calls for it.
